# Components

## ExampleButton

Single proposing-set component. Exists so the COMPONENT_FILES check has something to resolve against.

## Other re-exports

These wrappers ship from the source DS but are not annotated by this skill. Reach for them by importing directly from the upstream package; consult the linked types file for prop shapes.

- `ExampleNotice` — `import { ExampleNotice } from '@example/produced-skill'`. Props: see `@example/produced-skill/types/ExampleNotice.d.ts`.
- `ExampleModal` — `import { ExampleModal } from '@example/produced-skill'`. Props: see `@example/produced-skill/types/ExampleModal.d.ts`.
- `ExampleBadge` — `import { ExampleBadge } from '@example/produced-skill'`. Props: see `@example/produced-skill/types/ExampleBadge.d.ts`.
